text: Surrounded by glass walls and modern designs, I sense a clarity and sterility, as if the environment pushes me to contemplate purpose and order. Entering the exhibit, absorbed in words about research and development, my mind is drawn to the curious dance between human and technology. I feel small, a participant in something larger—a story of innovation and questioning. The text on the wall invites me inward: I am both observer and observed, pondering my own connection to the evolving landscape.
